example: He was just an ordinary boy who lived with ordinary parents in an ordinary house.

english: v. to become aware of something
example: It was a little hard to notice Jimmy.
You probably wouldn't notice him even if he was sitting right next to you.
Jimmy always got a perfect score.
His head seemed to absorb everything that was being taught at school.

english: v. to keep or save something in a place
example: Everything Jimmy had ever learned was stored somewhere inside his head.

english: adj. nervous and uncomfortable in front of people
example: He was very, very shy to say anything out loud.

english: v. to become red in the face
example: He blushed all over, and his whole body shook.
Maybe that was why Jimmy had such a huge head ㅡ to store all that knowledge.
